description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Live that runs on push events, excluding tags matching *RC* or *DB*. The workflow consists of four jobs: osx_job on macOS-latest, linux_job and linux_docker_job on ubuntu-18.04, and windows_job on windows-latest. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the AWS CLI, determines a tag, initializes submodules, installs dependencies, and then builds and deploys an artifact to AWS, with some jobs using Docker or specific build scripts.
